title: Welcome email series: what to send, when, and why most get it wrong
notes: Cover the purpose of each email in a 3-5 sequence. Contrast transactional welcome (single email) vs nurture sequence. Link to audit tool. Concrete examples for ecom vs SaaS.

title: The complete guide to Klaviyo flows for e-commerce
notes: Cover the 5 core flows: welcome, abandoned cart, abandoned browse, post-purchase, win-back. Include what to put in each email. Link to audit tool for self-assessment.

title: How to clean your email list — and when to sunset subscribers
notes: The case for a smaller, cleaner list. Define engagement windows (30/60/90 day). Sunset flow structure. Impact on deliverability and RPR.

title: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC explained for email marketers
notes: Plain-English explanation of each record and what it does. How to check if yours are set up correctly. What happens if DMARC is on monitoring vs enforcing. Common mistakes.

title: Abandoned cart email strategy: beyond the obvious 3-email sequence
notes: Cover timing, copy angle for each email, when to include discount vs not, how to structure the sequence for high vs low AOV. Mention browse abandonment as the underrated companion.

title: Post-purchase email flows that drive repeat orders
notes: The LTV case for post-purchase emails. What to send and when: order confirmation, delivery update, review request, cross-sell, replenishment. Keep it practical.

title: Email segmentation strategies that actually move revenue
notes: Cover engagement-based, purchase-based, and behavioural segmentation. Debunk 'send to everyone' thinking. Show RPR improvement with simple vs advanced segmentation.

title: Win-back email campaigns: how to re-engage lapsed subscribers
notes: Define what 'lapsed' means (90/180 days). The case for trying to win them back vs sunsetting. Email sequence structure. Subject line approaches. Sunset if unresponsive.

title: How to calculate email marketing ROI — and what most businesses get wrong
notes: Walk through attribution models. Introduce RPR as the primary metric. Cover contribution-to-total-revenue, flow-level vs campaign-level. Why opens and clicks are insufficient.

title: Klaviyo vs Mailchimp: which is right for your e-commerce store
notes: Honest comparison. Klaviyo wins on data depth, segmentation, and flow logic. Mailchimp still fine for simple newsletters. Migration path if switching. Don't be promotional.

title: Email deliverability: why your emails land in spam and how to fix it
notes: Inbox placement vs open rate. The three pillars: authentication, sender reputation, list hygiene. How to diagnose a deliverability problem. Google Postmaster Tools walkthrough.

title: Email marketing for SaaS: lifecycle stages and what to send at each one
notes: Different from ecom: focus on activation, adoption, expansion, retention. Trial-to-paid flow. Onboarding sequences. Churn prevention. Concrete examples.

title: When to Hire an Email Automation Agency (And What to Look For)
notes: Target brands considering outsourcing their email marketing. Cover: signs you've outgrown DIY email (revenue plateaus, time constraints, technical complexity), what services agencies provide vs in-house, red flags when vetting agencies, cost benchmarks for Australian market, and how to prepare for onboarding. Include case study example of a brand that scaled with agency support. Link to existing Klaviyo flows guide and segmentation strategies post.

title: 10 Email Marketing Automation Workflows Every E-Commerce Brand Needs
notes: Comprehensive workflow library beyond the basics. Include: browse abandonment, price drop alerts, back-in-stock, VIP/loyalty tier triggers, birthday/anniversary, cross-sell sequences, review request automation, and seasonal reactivation. Each workflow should have trigger logic, recommended email count, and expected performance benchmarks. Link to post-purchase flows, abandoned cart strategy, and win-back campaign posts for deeper dives.

title: Klaviyo Email Automation Setup: From Zero to Revenue-Generating Flows
notes: Step-by-step implementation guide for Klaviyo beginners. Cover: account structure best practices, integrating Shopify/BigCommerce, creating first three flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase), setting up segments, basic triggers and filters, and testing before going live. Include screenshots, common mistakes to avoid, and timeline expectations. Link to complete Klaviyo flows guide and segmentation strategies post.

title: Best Email Automation Software for Australian E-Commerce Brands (2024 Comparison)
notes: Compare top platforms for Australian market: Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Omnisend, Drip, ActiveCampaign. Evaluation criteria: Shopify integration depth, automation capabilities, pricing (AUD), deliverability, support timezone coverage, and scalability. Include decision matrix based on store size, technical resources, and budget. Position Klaviyo as the winner for serious e-commerce brands. Link to Klaviyo vs Mailchimp comparison and ROI calculation posts.

title: Email Automation Best Practices: 15 Ways to Increase Conversions
notes: Tactical optimization guide covering: timing and frequency rules, personalization beyond first name, dynamic content strategies, mobile optimization, subject line formulas, CTA placement, email length guidelines, A/B testing priorities, and avoiding automation fatigue. Include before/after examples from Australian e-commerce clients. Address both technical setup and copywriting tactics. Link to deliverability guide, segmentation strategies, and email list cleaning posts.

title: How to Choose Email Automation Services for Your E-Commerce Store (2024 Australian Guide)
notes: Create a comprehensive buyer's guide covering types of email automation services available, pricing models, what's included in typical packages, questions to ask providers, and specific considerations for Australian e-commerce brands. Include case study examples and link to Klaviyo comparison and automation setup guides.

title: What Does an Email Marketing Automation Agency Actually Do? (Complete Service Breakdown)
notes: Demystify agency services by breaking down specific deliverables: flow setup, list management, campaign strategy, copywriting, design, analytics reporting, and ongoing optimization. Include timeline expectations, typical engagement models, and before/after performance metrics. Link to '10 email automation workflows' and 'calculate email marketing ROI' posts.

title: Mailchimp to Klaviyo Migration: Complete Step-by-Step Integration Guide for Australian Stores
notes: Target migration intent with practical walkthrough: data export/import process, preserving subscriber consent, recreating automations in Klaviyo, handling integrations, testing before full switch, and common pitfalls. Include timeline and checklist. Link to 'Klaviyo vs Mailchimp' comparison and 'Klaviyo email automation setup' posts.

title: The Complete Guide to Klaviyo Agencies in Australia: Certifications, Partners & What to Look For
notes: Target position 41.3 ranking with focused content on Australian Klaviyo partner landscape. Explain Klaviyo certification tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum), what they mean, directory of certified Australian partners, questions to ask before hiring, pricing benchmarks for Australian market, and how to verify credentials. Include comparison table of service offerings by partner tier.
